40192.overview: Classic Tempest Keep raid mount: Kael’thas Sunstrider can drop a phoenix mount. In Retail the instance is legacy content, but the drop is still a long-odds farm for collectors. Confirm current difficulty, lockout, and personal vs legacy loot rules on Wowhead before you chain runs.
checklist: Fly to Tempest Keep in Outland and zone into The Eye (raid).
Clear the four advisors, then Kael’thas; learn whether you must loot the boss or use the journal.
Note your lockout (still typically weekly for legacy raids — verify for your version).
If it does not drop, wait for reset and repeat — track attempts if it helps morale.

72286.overview: Icecrown Citadel endboss mount tied to The Lich King. Historically tied to heroic difficulty; Retail tuning may differ. This is a prestige weekly lockout farm — expect many clears. Double-check which difficulties can drop the reins today.
checklist: Travel to Icecrown Citadel (Northrend) and set difficulty per current drop rules.
Clear through to The Lich King (shortcut unlocks may exist — confirm in-game / Wowhead).
Defeat the Lich King and loot per your loot spec and legacy rules.
Respect the weekly lockout; add the raid to a fixed rotation if you are serious.

60002.overview: Storm Peaks rare spawn with heavy competition: campers, layer hopping, and timers matter more than gear. Not a dungeon — it is an open-world race when it spawns. Use community spawn trackers only if they respect game rules.
checklist: Finish any prerequisites (if any) listed on Wowhead for seeing or looting the drake.
Camp or patrol the documented Storm Peaks routes with a fast flyer.
Watch for other players — announce courteously or form a group policy.
On kill, loot immediately; confirm mount goes to collection.

6648.overview: Basic human racial vendor mount: buy with gold from the Elwynn Forest stable hub. No RNG — good contrast to raid/world farms in this pilot set.
checklist: Go to Eastvale Logging Camp area (Elwynn Forest) on a human character (or verify cross-faction vendor access).
Open the mount vendor and buy Chestnut Mare if listed.
Learn the mount from the spellbook / collections UI.

71810.overview: Legacy Gladiator-season reward mount. Most players will not earn this from current PvP seasons; availability may be historical only or special sources like BMAH. Treat this pilot entry as a template for achievement-tied mounts — always verify obtainability.
checklist: Read Wowhead comments + patch notes for whether this exact mount still drops or is sold.
If tied to an achievement, open the achievement panel and read criteria.
If unobtainable, note that in your personal tracker and pick another farm.

5784.overview: Warlock class quest chain reward (Felsteed). Gated by class and storyline progression in classic-era content; Retail may streamline access. Follow the quest log rather than random drops.
checklist: Roll or log a Warlock at appropriate level for the Felsteed quest arc.
Pick up the chain from your class trainer hub (exact NPC varies by era — use Wowhead quest list).
Complete each quest step in order until the mount spell is granted.
Summon Felsteed from the mount collection to confirm completion.
